hypothesis.strategy: Expand the 4 lowest-scoring articles (aide, aider, semantic-scholar-api, agentic-tree-search) with substantial depth, 2025-2026 papers, and footnoted references. Add SVG diagram to aide.
hypothesis.reasoning: Past sessions showed that adding 2025-2026 sourced content reliably boosts currency and sourcing scores. aide and aider need the most work since their standard-tier promotion exposed low depth/sourcing. agentic-tree-search has currency=20 (lowest in wiki). Targeting all 4 lowest articles should yield broad composite improvement.

result.lesson: Adding 2025-2026 papers with footnotes is the most reliable improvement strategy. agentic-tree-search jumped +14.1 (biggest gain) from currency=20 to 70 by adding 6 MCTS papers. aide +12.1, aider +12.4, semantic-scholar-api +11.1. All four targeted articles improved by >10 points. New lowest is huggingface-papers-api (75.0).
